component.name: Clippy
component.summary: Privacy focused clipboard manager with sync and encryption

description.p: Clippy is a clipboard manager built with Rust and TypeScript. It supports text, images, files, HTML, and RTF content with smart search, favorites, and customizable hotkeys.

ul.li: Multi-content support (text, HTML, RTF, images, files)
Cloud sync via Google Drive with end-to-end encryption
Type out clipboard content where pasting is not allowed
Smart search for links, colors, images, and hex codes
Customizable global hotkeys and keyboard shortcuts
Dark and light mode with multiple language support

description.p: Latest release with bug fixes and improvements.
